case_title: JONES, LOREN vs. HADEN, RICHARD et al

docket_entries.description: OPPOSITION DEMURREER FILED BY PLAINTIFF JONES, LOREN
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, STIPULATION AND ORDER ADVANCING TIME TO HEAR DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, CALENDAR OF JUN-15-1995, SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND, THE NOTICES ARE FATALLY DEFECTIVE.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
PARTIES NOTIFIED OF COMPLETION OF TRANSCRIPTS
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT HADEN, RICHARD HEARING SET FOR JUN-22-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT HADEN, RICHARD ANY COSTS AND ATTONEY'S FEES TO WHICH DEFENDANT MAYBE ENTITLED TO BE DETERMINED BY COURT.
NOTICE OF APPEAL/REQUEST FOR TRANSCRIPT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JONES, LOREN
REMITTITUR FILED ABANDONMENT AND REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL OF APPEAL HAVING BEEN FILED ON MAY 30, 1996, IT IS ORDERED THAT THE APPEAL IN THE ABOVE ENTITLED ACTION BE DISMISSED PURSUANT TO CRC 133.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JONES, LOREN AS TO DEFENDANT HADEN, RICHARD DOES 1 TO 50 SUMMONS ISSUED
STIPULATION AND ORDER ADVANCING TIME TO HEAR DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT HADEN, RICHARD HEARING SET FOR JUN-15-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02
